sv.h: The art of hospitality, <highlight>to the letter</highlight>.
sv.lead: Four bespoke service categories, negotiated by our local team with selected partners. Fixed pricing throughout the event.

t1.d: English-speaking drivers, premium fleet, airport welcome with customs fast-track and porter. For delegations, 7-seat air-conditioned vans with on-board WiFi.

t2.d: Delegation rates negotiated with 4★ and 5★ properties in Plateau and Cocody. Automatic upgrade subject to availability, late check-in included.

t3.d: Halal menus available across all services. Abidjan's gourmet tables booked for you, boxed lunches delivered to the SIREXE pavilion.

t4.d: Everything that makes a business trip memorable — from a Grand-Bassam excursion to Arabic ↔ French interpretation for your business meetings.

cta.h: Build your stay in under three minutes.

sa.eye: 1st edition · under the patronage of the Ministry of Mines, Petroleum and Energy
sa.tag: International Exhibition of Extractive and Energy Resources in Côte d'Ivoire.

p1.d: Gold, manganese, nickel, lithium, bauxite. Roundtables, B2B, exploration permits and mining finance.

p2.d: Deep-offshore, refining, LNG. International partnerships, local content, energy transition of the sector.

p3.d: Solar, hydroelectric, biomass, green hydrogen. National strategies, African energy mix, universal access to electricity.

day1.d: Reception of delegations, Minister's address, protocol dinner.

day3.d: Recognition of the year's mining, energy and oil projects.

day4.d: Mines, offshore platforms, solar plants — registration required.

conc.h: SIREXE Concierge supports international delegations from 11 to 17 March 2026.

as.h:
A local team, <highlight>24/7</highlight>,
until you depart.
as.lead: French-, English- and Arabic-speaking concierges. Average reply time 4 minutes, guaranteed by SLA.

emer.h: For any unexpected need during your stay in Abidjan.
emer.d: Lost documents, flight delay, medical need, change of itinerary — a senior concierge is reachable in under 90 seconds.

faq.lead: A question not listed here? Our WhatsApp team replies in minutes.

as.q1: Is the service available in Arabic?
as.a1: Yes — our senior concierges are French- and English-speaking, and we provide a certified Arabic interpreter on demand for business meetings and calls.
as.q2: Can I change my booking after payment?
as.a2: All services can be modified up to 72 hours before your arrival. Beyond that, contact support — we do our best at no extra charge.
as.q3: Is Mobile Money payment secure for a foreigner?
as.a3: Yes — we operate via GeniusPay, approved by BCEAO. Transactions are processed in real time, with SMS confirmation and full traceability exportable to PDF.
as.q4: Do you invoice in my company's name?
as.a4: Of course — provide your company name, tax address and VAT number at payment. Invoice issued within 24 h in French and English.
as.a5: Full refund up to 7 days before arrival, 50% between 7 days and 72 h, fees retained beyond. Cancellation insurance (+18,000 XOF) removes any penalty.
as.q6: Do you help with visa applications?
as.a6: Our Visa Express service issues an invitation letter and supports the Côte d'Ivoire e-Visa procedure within 48 hours (45,000 XOF). Select "Assistance requested" at the passport step.
